run_summary.summary:
Big day in the inbox! 17 messages scanned across 10+ threads — here's what's actionable:

🚨 **SOJOS contract just landed** (Apr 15, 1am) — Ruby from SOJOS sent the contract after Liz asked for a signed agreement yesterday. Ruby also wants to know what content concept Liz has in mind. Glasses are already at the house. This needs Liz's attention TODAY.

✅ **Whisker content submitted** — Liz sent the Litter-Robot content to Cheyenne at Whisker for approval yesterday (Apr 14). Drive link is live. Ball is in Whisker's court.

📦 **BHG x Walmart moving forward** — Liz sent her shipping address to Gretta (BHG Collective) on Apr 14. Product is on its way for the outdoor living campaign.

🔴 **Dreo posting window opened TODAY (Apr 15–30)** — Still no response from Yaki at Vanzo Media to the $3K quote from Apr 1. Liz followed up Apr 14. This one is urgent — the window closes Apr 30.

Also: Liz did a big batch of follow-ups on Apr 14 after getting back from vacation — Bringnox, Rust-Oleum, Govee, Ollny, Hello Fresh. All waiting on brand.

One new inbound: xTool (laser cutting/engraving brand, 1M+ creator community) reached out Apr 15 about an 80W CO2 laser collab. Worth a look if that fits Liz's content.

suggestions.message: xTool (laser cutting/engraving, 1M+ creators) sent an inbound pitch today (Apr 15) from Laura at gengchunhong@makeblock.com — subject 'xTool Collab // 80W CO2 Laser for Bigger Projects'. Could be interesting if DIY/craft content fits Liz's feed. Worth replying to if interested.

Dreo posting window opened TODAY (Apr 15). Yaki at Vanzo Media still hasn't responded to the $3K quote from Apr 1. If no response by Apr 17, this deal may need to be closed out — the window only runs through Apr 30.

deals.next_action: Review SOJOS contract and reply to Ruby with content concept
deals.notes: [Apr 15]: Ruby sent contract attachment and asked Liz to confirm what content she wants to create. Liz had confirmed glasses received Apr 14 and asked for a signed agreement before shooting.
deals.activity_note: Apr 15: SOJOS contract received from Ruby — moved to Contract. Ruby also asking for content concept confirmation.

deals.next_action: Follow up with Cheyenne on content approval

deals.activity_note: Apr 14: Liz submitted content to Cheyenne at Whisker for approval — moved to Approval

deals.notes: [Apr 14]: Liz sent shipping address to Gretta (BHG Collective, bhgcollective@people.inc) — product being shipped for outdoor living campaign. Address: 2241 Bird Ln, Batavia IL 60510.
deals.activity_note: Apr 14: Liz confirmed shipping address to Gretta at BHG Collective — product on its way

deals.next_action: Follow up with Yaki at Vanzo Media — posting window closes Apr 30
deals.notes: [Apr 14]: Liz sent follow-up to Yaki — no response to $3K quote from Apr 1. Posting window April 15–30 is now open. Via Vanzo Media. Deliverables: 1 IG Reel co-post with DREO, Link in bio 7 days, 1 Story with link. Kenny CC'd.
deals.activity_note: Apr 14: Liz sent follow-up to Yaki at Vanzo Media — no response to $3K quote from Apr 1. Posting window April 15–30 now OPEN.

deals.notes: [Apr 14]: Liz sent follow-up to Camellia after vacation — ongoing negotiation on IG reel at $2K (no ad code; usage rights charged separately based on duration). Kenny CC'd.
deals.activity_note: Apr 14: Liz followed up with Camellia Liang on Bringnox IG reel negotiation — awaiting response

deals.notes: [Apr 14]: Liz sent another bump to Jackie Walsh — 'bumping this up one more time to see if you received our last note.' Subject: Walk-In Pantry Transformation collab. Kenny CC'd.
